description: ZAI/GLM is the only LLM call site today (ContactExtractor name step) and degrades to regex without it. Keep req_llm in the stack for the ash_ai/AshLua direction (local-doc extraction + reasoning Exa can't do). Action: refresh the expired ZAI_API_KEY, or pick another req_llm provider (Anthropic etc.). Not a blocker -- web contacts use Exa's own LLM; only RFP-text name extraction needs this.
title: Decide/refresh LLM provider (ZAI/req_llm) for ash_ai path
